^MMT
^PW1200

^BY3,3,94^FT55,552^BCN,,N,N
^FD>%BarcodeMcmSerial%^FS
^FT806,579^BQN,2,9
^FH\^FDMA,%QRSerial%^FS
^PQ1,0,1,Y^XZ, the QRSErial is formed combining NCNSerial-RemSerial-DatePaired, it is printed in a 600dpi printer, I need the option to write the ParNum, then scan the QR from the previous label, split in in the element and replace the information to print again, color is also need to be write, once scan one unit, print it, clean the serialnumber input for next.

The user is working in the BeFirst_Production repository at `S:\01_Repos\BeFirst_Production\BeFirst\Produccion\` and needs a new form called `frm_Labeling_label_Reprint_2` that will:

1. Allow printing a specific ZPL label code for reprinting labels
2. The label contains:
   - Part Number
   - REM SERIAL #
   - MCM SERIAL #
   - DATE PAIRED
   - BAG COLOR
   - Barcode (Code 128) with MCM Serial
   - QR Code with format: NCNSerial-RemSerial-DatePaired

3. The workflow should be:
   - User enters Part Number
   - User scans QR code from existing label
   - Split the QR data (NCNSerial-RemSerial-DatePaired)
   - User enters Bag Color
   - Print the label
   - Clear serial number input for next label

4. Label specs:
   - 600dpi printer
   - ZPL format
   - QR code format: NCNSerial-RemSerial-DatePaired

This is a WinForms application in VB.NET (based on the BeFirst_Production context from the CLAUDE.md).

1. First check the existing form structure to understand patterns
2. Look at similar forms in the Production folder
3. Create the new form following existing patterns

Public Class frm_Labels_labelReprint


    Private Sub txt_antiguo_KeyPress(sender As Object, e As KeyPressEventArgs) Handles txt_antiguo.KeyPress
        If e.KeyChar = Convert.ToChar(13) Then
            btn_send.PerformClick()
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub btn_send_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btn_send.Click


        Dim inicio As Integer = 1
        Dim final As Integer = 1

        Try
            inicio = CInt(txtin.Text)
        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

        Try
            final = CInt(txout.Text)
        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

        For ii As Integer = inicio To final

            ExData.Labels_serialreprint = txt_antiguo.Text

            Dim counter As String = ii

            Try
                counter = counter.PadLeft(txtPad.Text, "0"c)
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

            ExData.Labels_serialreprint = ExData.Labels_serialreprint.Replace("[#]", counter)

            frm_Labels.txt_serial.Text = 1
            frm_Labels.btn_Add.PerformClick()

        Next

        txtin.Text = ""
        txout.Text = ""

        txt_antiguo.Text = ""
        txt_antiguo.Select()
    End Sub

    Private Sub frm_Labels_RePrint_FormClosing(sender As Object, e As FormClosingEventArgs) Handles MyBase.FormClosing
        frm_Labels.ch_reprint.Checked = False
    End Sub

End Class

Imports System
Imports System.Drawing
Imports System.Drawing.Printing
Imports System.Windows.Forms
Imports System.Runtime.InteropServices
Imports System.IO
Imports System.Management
Imports System.Drawing.Imaging
Imports System.Text

Public Class BeZebraPrint
    <StructLayout(LayoutKind.Sequential, CharSet:=CharSet.Ansi)>
    Public Class DOCINFOA
        <MarshalAs(UnmanagedType.LPStr)>
        Public pDocName As String
        <MarshalAs(UnmanagedType.LPStr)>
        Public pOutputFile As String
        <MarshalAs(UnmanagedType.LPStr)>
        Public pDataType As String
    End Class


    <DllImport("winspool.Drv", EntryPoint:="OpenPrinterA", SetLastError:=True, CharSet:=CharSet.Ansi, ExactSpelling:=True, CallingConvention:=CallingConvention.StdCall)>
    Shared Function OpenPrinter(<MarshalAs(UnmanagedType.LPStr)> ByVal szPrinter As String, <Out> ByRef hPrinter As IntPtr, ByVal pd As IntPtr) As Boolean

    End Function

    <DllImport("winspool.Drv", EntryPoint:="ClosePrinter", SetLastError:=True, ExactSpelling:=True, CallingConvention:=CallingConvention.StdCall)>
    Shared Function ClosePrinter(ByVal hPrinter As IntPtr) As Boolean

    End Function

    <DllImport("winspool.Drv", EntryPoint:="StartDocPrinterA", SetLastError:=True, CharSet:=CharSet.Ansi, ExactSpelling:=True, CallingConvention:=CallingConvention.StdCall)>
    Shared Function StartDocPrinter(ByVal hPrinter As IntPtr, ByVal level As Int32, <[In], MarshalAs(UnmanagedType.LPStruct)> ByVal di As DOCINFOA) As Boolean

    End Function

    <DllImport("winspool.Drv", EntryPoint:="EndDocPrinter", SetLastError:=True, ExactSpelling:=True, CallingConvention:=CallingConvention.StdCall)>
    Shared Function EndDocPrinter(ByVal hPrinter As IntPtr) As Boolean

    End Function

    <DllImport("winspool.Drv", EntryPoint:="StartPagePrinter", SetLastError:=True, ExactSpelling:=True, CallingConvention:=CallingConvention.StdCall)>
    Shared Function StartPagePrinter(ByVal hPrinter As IntPtr) As Boolean

    End Function

    <DllImport("winspool.Drv", EntryPoint:="EndPagePrinter", SetLastError:=True, ExactSpelling:=True, CallingConvention:=CallingConvention.StdCall)>
    Shared Function EndPagePrinter(ByVal hPrinter As IntPtr) As Boolean

    End Function

    <DllImport("winspool.Drv", EntryPoint:="WritePrinter", SetLastError:=True, ExactSpelling:=True, CallingConvention:=CallingConvention.StdCall)>
    Shared Function WritePrinter(ByVal hPrinter As IntPtr, ByVal pBytes As IntPtr, ByVal dwCount As Int32, <Out> ByRef dwWritten As Int32) As Boolean

    End Function

    Public Shared Function SendBytesToPrinter(ByVal szPrinterName As String, ByVal pBytes As IntPtr, ByVal dwCount As Int32) As Boolean
        Dim dwError As Int32 = 0, dwWritten As Int32 = 0
        Dim hPrinter As IntPtr = New IntPtr(0)
        Dim di As DOCINFOA = New DOCINFOA()
        Dim bSuccess As Boolean = False
        di.pDocName = "Plex Label"
        di.pDataType = "RAW"

        If OpenPrinter(szPrinterName.Normalize(), hPrinter, IntPtr.Zero) Then

            If StartDocPrinter(hPrinter, 1, di) Then

                If StartPagePrinter(hPrinter) Then
                    bSuccess = WritePrinter(hPrinter, pBytes, dwCount, dwWritten)
                    EndPagePrinter(hPrinter)
                End If

                EndDocPrinter(hPrinter)
            End If

            ClosePrinter(hPrinter)
        End If

        If bSuccess = False Then
            dwError = Marshal.GetLastWin32Error()
        End If

        Return bSuccess
    End Function

    Public Shared Function SendFileToPrinter(ByVal szPrinterName As String, ByVal szFileName As String) As Boolean
        Dim fs As FileStream = New FileStream(szFileName, FileMode.Open)
        Dim br As BinaryReader = New BinaryReader(fs)
        Dim bytes As Byte() = New Byte(fs.Length - 1) {}
        Dim bSuccess As Boolean = False
        Dim pUnmanagedBytes As IntPtr = New IntPtr(0)
        Dim nLength As Integer
        nLength = Convert.ToInt32(fs.Length)
        bytes = br.ReadBytes(nLength)
        pUnmanagedBytes = Marshal.AllocCoTaskMem(nLength)
        Marshal.Copy(bytes, 0, pUnmanagedBytes, nLength)
        bSuccess = SendBytesToPrinter(szPrinterName, pUnmanagedBytes, nLength)
        Marshal.FreeCoTaskMem(pUnmanagedBytes)
        Return bSuccess
    End Function

    Public Shared Function SendStringToPrinter(ByVal szPrinterName As String, ByVal szString As String) As Boolean

        'CREATE A COMPUTERLOG TO SAVE 
        Dim leftCharacters As String = ""

        Try
            leftCharacters = szString.Substring(0, 50)
        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

        Try
            ExFunctions.WriteToFile(DateTime.Now.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.fff",
                                            Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture) & " " & szPrinterName & " " & leftCharacters, "C:\BeFirst\prints.txt")
        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

        Dim pBytes As IntPtr
        Dim dwCount As Int32
        dwCount = szString.Length
        pBytes = Marshal.StringToCoTaskMemAnsi(szString)

        If szPrinterName = "" Or szPrinterName = "DEFAULT" Then
            'GET PRINT DEFAULT 
            Try
                For Each printer In PrinterUtility2.GetDefaultPrinters()
                    If PrinterUtility2.IsOnline(printer) And PrinterUtility2.IsDefault(printer) Then
                        szPrinterName = printer("Name")
                        Exit For
                    End If
                Next
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try
        End If

        SendBytesToPrinter(szPrinterName, pBytes, dwCount)
        Marshal.FreeCoTaskMem(pBytes)
        Return True
    End Function

    Public Shared Function CreateGRF(ByVal filename As String, ByVal imagename As String) As String
        Dim bmp As Bitmap = Nothing
        Dim imgData As BitmapData = Nothing
        Dim pixels As Byte()
        Dim x, y, width As Integer
        Dim sb As StringBuilder
        Dim ptr As IntPtr

        Try
            bmp = New Bitmap(filename)
            imgData = bmp.LockBits(New Rectangle(0, 0, bmp.Width, bmp.Height), ImageLockMode.[ReadOnly], PixelFormat.Format1bppIndexed)
            width = (bmp.Width + 7) / 8
            pixels = New Byte(width - 1) {}
            sb = New StringBuilder(width * bmp.Height * 2)
            ptr = imgData.Scan0

            For y = 0 To bmp.Height - 1
                Marshal.Copy(ptr, pixels, 0, width)

                For x = 0 To width - 1
                    sb.AppendFormat("{0:X2}", CByte(Not pixels(x)))
                Next

                ptr = CType((ptr.ToInt64() + imgData.Stride), IntPtr)
            Next

        Finally

            If bmp IsNot Nothing Then
                If imgData IsNot Nothing Then bmp.UnlockBits(imgData)
                bmp.Dispose()
            End If
        End Try

        Return String.Format("~DG{0}.GRF,{1},{2},", imagename, width * y, width) + sb.ToString()
    End Function
End Class



Public Class PrinterUtility2
    Public Shared Function IsOnline(ByVal printer As ManagementBaseObject) As Boolean
        Dim status = printer("PrinterStatus")
        Dim workOffline = CBool(printer("WorkOffline"))
        If workOffline Then Return False
        Try
            Dim statusAsInteger As Integer = Int32.Parse(status.ToString())

            Select Case statusAsInteger
                Case 3, 4, 5, 6
                    Return True
                Case Else
                    Return False
            End Select
        Catch ex As Exception
            Return False
        End Try
    End Function

    Public Shared Function IsDefault(ByVal printer As ManagementBaseObject) As Boolean
        Dim IsDefaultPrinter = False
        Try
            IsDefaultPrinter = CBool(printer("Default"))
        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try
        Return IsDefaultPrinter
    End Function

    Public Shared Function GetDefaultPrinters() As ManagementObjectCollection
        Dim printerSearcher = New ManagementObjectSearcher("SELECT * FROM Win32_Printer")

        Return printerSearcher.[Get]()
    End Function
End Class

Imports System.Data.SqlClient

Public Class frm_PVS_labelReprintSerials
    Private Sub Button1_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button1.Click

        Dim boxParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
            {
                New SqlParameter("@BoxID", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = txt_username.Text}
            }

        Dim dt As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT [PartID] ,[SSN] FROM [PD_tbl_units_packed] where BoxID=@BoxID and DelDate is null", boxParameter)

        For Each unit As DataRow In dt.Rows
            Dim dt_unit As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT [FormatID],[PrinterIP],[PrinterName],[ZPL_Code] FROM [Part_Operation_Packout_Print_SSN_List] WHERE partid='" & unit.Item(0) & "'")

            If dt_unit.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                ExFunctions.PrintExtraLabel(0, unit.Item(1), dt_unit.Rows(0).Item(0), dt_unit.Rows(0).Item(2))
            End If
        Next
    End Sub

End Class

Now I'll create the new form `frm_Labeling_label_Reprint_2`. This form will:
1. Allow entry of Part Number
2. Scan QR code and split it (NCNSerial-RemSerial-DatePaired)
3. Allow entry of Bag Color
4. Print the label with the specific ZPL format
5. Clear inputs for the next label

input.content:
Imports System.Text.RegularExpressions

Public Class frm_Labeling_label_Reprint_2

    ' Form load event
    Private Sub frm_Labeling_label_Reprint_2_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load
        ' Set focus to Part Number field
        txt_PartNum.Select()
        txt_PartNum.Focus()
    End Sub

    ' Part Number KeyPress - move to QR scan field on Enter
    Private Sub txt_PartNum_KeyPress(sender As Object, e As KeyPressEventArgs) Handles txt_PartNum.KeyPress
        If e.KeyChar = Convert.ToChar(13) Then
            e.Handled = True
            txt_QRScan.Select()
            txt_QRScan.Focus()
        End If
    End Sub

    ' QR Scan KeyPress - process on Enter
    Private Sub txt_QRScan_KeyPress(sender As Object, e As KeyPressEventArgs) Handles txt_QRScan.KeyPress
        If e.KeyChar = Convert.ToChar(13) Then
            e.Handled = True
            ProcessQRCode()
        End If
    End Sub

    ' Bag Color KeyPress - print on Enter
    Private Sub txt_BagColor_KeyPress(sender As Object, e As KeyPressEventArgs) Handles txt_BagColor.KeyPress
        If e.KeyChar = Convert.ToChar(13) Then
            e.Handled = True
            btn_Print.PerformClick()
        End If
    End Sub

    ' Process QR Code - split into components
    Private Sub ProcessQRCode()
        Try
            Dim qrData As String = txt_QRScan.Text.Trim()

            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(qrData) Then
                MessageBox.Show("Please scan a QR code.", "QR Code Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_QRScan.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            ' Split QR code by hyphen: NCNSerial-RemSerial-DatePaired
            Dim parts() As String = qrData.Split("-"c)

            If parts.Length <> 3 Then
                MessageBox.Show("Invalid QR code format. Expected format: NCNSerial-RemSerial-DatePaired", "Invalid QR Code", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
                txt_QRScan.SelectAll()
                txt_QRScan.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            ' Populate fields from QR code
            txt_McmSerial.Text = parts(0).Trim()  ' NCN Serial (MCM Serial)
            txt_RemSerial.Text = parts(1).Trim()  ' REM Serial
            txt_DatePaired.Text = parts(2).Trim() ' Date Paired

            ' Move focus to Bag Color
            txt_BagColor.Select()
            txt_BagColor.Focus()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("Error processing QR code: " & ex.Message, "Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            txt_QRScan.SelectAll()
            txt_QRScan.Focus()
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' Print button click
    Private Sub btn_Print_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btn_Print.Click
        Try
            ' Validate all required fields
            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt_PartNum.Text.Trim()) Then
                MessageBox.Show("Please enter Part Number.", "Part Number Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_PartNum.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt_McmSerial.Text.Trim()) Then
                MessageBox.Show("Please scan a QR code first.", "QR Code Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_QRScan.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt_RemSerial.Text.Trim()) Then
                MessageBox.Show("REM Serial is missing. Please scan a valid QR code.", "REM Serial Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_QRScan.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt_DatePaired.Text.Trim()) Then
                MessageBox.Show("Date Paired is missing. Please scan a valid QR code.", "Date Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_QRScan.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt_BagColor.Text.Trim()) Then
                MessageBox.Show("Please enter Bag Color.", "Bag Color Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_BagColor.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            ' Build ZPL code with replacements
            Dim zplCode As String = BuildZPLCode()

            ' Send to printer
            BeZebraPrint.SendStringToPrinter("DEFAULT", zplCode)

            ' Show success message
            lbl_Status.Text = "Label printed successfully!"
            lbl_Status.ForeColor = Color.Green

            ' Clear fields for next label
            ClearSerialFields()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("Error printing label: " & ex.Message, "Print Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            lbl_Status.Text = "Print failed!"
            lbl_Status.ForeColor = Color.Red
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' Build ZPL code with data replacements
    Private Function BuildZPLCode() As String
        ' Reconstruct QR code content: NCNSerial-RemSerial-DatePaired
        Dim qrContent As String = txt_McmSerial.Text.Trim() & "-" & txt_RemSerial.Text.Trim() & "-" & txt_DatePaired.Text.Trim()

        ' ZPL template with placeholders
        Dim zpl As String = "^XA~TA000~JSN^LT0^MNW^MTT^PON^PMN^LH0,0^JMA^PR2,2~SD25^JUS^LRN^CI0^XZ" & vbCrLf &
                           "^XA" & vbCrLf &
                           "^MMT" & vbCrLf &
                           "^PW1200" & vbCrLf &
                           "^LL0600" & vbCrLf &
                           "^LS0" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT55,102^A0N,83,76^FH\^FDPart #:^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT288,102^A0N,83,76^FH\^FD%PartNum%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT55,262^A0N,58,55^FH\^FDREM SERIAL #:^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT443,262^A0N,58,55^FH\^FD%RemSerial%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT455,175^A0N,58,55^FH\^FD%McmSerial%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT55,176^A0N,58,55^FH\^FDMCM SERIAL #:^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT55,434^A0N,58,55^FH\^FDBAG COLOR:^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT55,349^A0N,58,55^FH\^FDDATE PAIRED:^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT426,349^A0N,58,55^FH\^FD%DatePaired%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT375,435^A0N,58,55^FH\^FD%BagColor%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^BY3,3,94^FT55,552^BCN,,N,N" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FD>%BarcodeMcmSerial%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT806,579^BQN,2,9" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FH\^FDMA,%QRSerial%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^PQ1,0,1,Y^XZ"

        ' Replace placeholders with actual data
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%PartNum%", txt_PartNum.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%RemSerial%", txt_RemSerial.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%McmSerial%", txt_McmSerial.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%DatePaired%", txt_DatePaired.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%BagColor%", txt_BagColor.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%BarcodeMcmSerial%", txt_McmSerial.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%QRSerial%", qrContent)

        Return zpl
    End Function

    ' Clear serial number fields for next label
    Private Sub ClearSerialFields()
        txt_QRScan.Text = ""
        txt_McmSerial.Text = ""
        txt_RemSerial.Text = ""
        txt_DatePaired.Text = ""
        txt_BagColor.Text = ""
        lbl_Status.Text = ""

        ' Return focus to QR scan field (Part Number stays same for batch)
        txt_QRScan.Select()
        txt_QRScan.Focus()
    End Sub

    ' Clear All button - reset entire form
    Private Sub btn_ClearAll_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btn_ClearAll.Click
        txt_PartNum.Text = ""
        ClearSerialFields()
        lbl_Status.Text = ""
        txt_PartNum.Select()
        txt_PartNum.Focus()
    End Sub

    End Sub

Imports System.Text.RegularExpressions

Public Class frm_Labeling_label_Reprint_2

    ' Form load event
    Private Sub frm_Labeling_label_Reprint_2_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load
        ' Set focus to Part Number field
        txt_PartNum.Select()
        txt_PartNum.Focus()
    End Sub

    ' Part Number KeyPress - move to QR scan field on Enter
    Private Sub txt_PartNum_KeyPress(sender As Object, e As KeyPressEventArgs) Handles txt_PartNum.KeyPress
        If e.KeyChar = Convert.ToChar(13) Then
            e.Handled = True
            txt_QRScan.Select()
            txt_QRScan.Focus()
        End If
    End Sub

    ' QR Scan KeyPress - process on Enter
    Private Sub txt_QRScan_KeyPress(sender As Object, e As KeyPressEventArgs) Handles txt_QRScan.KeyPress
        If e.KeyChar = Convert.ToChar(13) Then
            e.Handled = True
            ProcessQRCode()
        End If
    End Sub

    ' Bag Color KeyPress - print on Enter
    Private Sub txt_BagColor_KeyPress(sender As Object, e As KeyPressEventArgs) Handles txt_BagColor.KeyPress
        If e.KeyChar = Convert.ToChar(13) Then
            e.Handled = True
            btn_Print.PerformClick()
        End If
    End Sub

    ' Process QR Code - split into components
    Private Sub ProcessQRCode()
        Try
            Dim qrData As String = txt_QRScan.Text.Trim()

            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(qrData) Then
                MessageBox.Show("Please scan a QR code.", "QR Code Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_QRScan.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            ' Split QR code by hyphen: NCNSerial-RemSerial-DatePaired
            Dim parts() As String = qrData.Split("-"c)

            If parts.Length <> 3 Then
                MessageBox.Show("Invalid QR code format. Expected format: NCNSerial-RemSerial-DatePaired", "Invalid QR Code", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
                txt_QRScan.SelectAll()
                txt_QRScan.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            ' Populate fields from QR code
            txt_McmSerial.Text = parts(0).Trim()  ' NCN Serial (MCM Serial)
            txt_RemSerial.Text = parts(1).Trim()  ' REM Serial
            txt_DatePaired.Text = parts(2).Trim() ' Date Paired

            ' Move focus to Bag Color
            txt_BagColor.Select()
            txt_BagColor.Focus()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("Error processing QR code: " & ex.Message, "Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            txt_QRScan.SelectAll()
            txt_QRScan.Focus()
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' Print button click
    Private Sub btn_Print_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btn_Print.Click
        Try
            ' Validate all required fields
            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt_PartNum.Text.Trim()) Then
                MessageBox.Show("Please enter Part Number.", "Part Number Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_PartNum.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt_McmSerial.Text.Trim()) Then
                MessageBox.Show("Please scan a QR code first.", "QR Code Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_QRScan.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt_RemSerial.Text.Trim()) Then
                MessageBox.Show("REM Serial is missing. Please scan a valid QR code.", "REM Serial Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_QRScan.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt_DatePaired.Text.Trim()) Then
                MessageBox.Show("Date Paired is missing. Please scan a valid QR code.", "Date Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_QRScan.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt_BagColor.Text.Trim()) Then
                MessageBox.Show("Please enter Bag Color.", "Bag Color Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_BagColor.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            ' Build ZPL code with replacements
            Dim zplCode As String = BuildZPLCode()

            ' Send to printer
            BeZebraPrint.SendStringToPrinter("DEFAULT", zplCode)

            ' Show success message
            lbl_Status.Text = "Label printed successfully!"
            lbl_Status.ForeColor = Color.Green

            ' Clear fields for next label
            ClearSerialFields()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("Error printing label: " & ex.Message, "Print Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            lbl_Status.Text = "Print failed!"
            lbl_Status.ForeColor = Color.Red
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' Build ZPL code with data replacements
    Private Function BuildZPLCode() As String
        ' Reconstruct QR code content: NCNSerial-RemSerial-DatePaired
        Dim qrContent As String = txt_McmSerial.Text.Trim() & "-" & txt_RemSerial.Text.Trim() & "-" & txt_DatePaired.Text.Trim()

        ' ZPL template with placeholders
        Dim zpl As String = "^XA~TA000~JSN^LT0^MNW^MTT^PON^PMN^LH0,0^JMA^PR2,2~SD25^JUS^LRN^CI0^XZ" & vbCrLf &
                           "^XA" & vbCrLf &
                           "^MMT" & vbCrLf &
                           "^PW1200" & vbCrLf &
                           "^LL0600" & vbCrLf &
                           "^LS0" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT55,102^A0N,83,76^FH\^FDPart #:^FS" & vbCrLf &

                           "^FT55,349^A0N,58,55^FH\^FDDATE PAIRED:^FS" & vbCrLf &

                           "^FT806,579^BQN,2,9" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FH\^FDMA,%QRSerial%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^PQ1,0,1,Y^XZ"

        ' Replace placeholders with actual data
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%PartNum%", txt_PartNum.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%RemSerial%", txt_RemSerial.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%McmSerial%", txt_McmSerial.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%DatePaired%", txt_DatePaired.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%BagColor%", txt_BagColor.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%BarcodeMcmSerial%", txt_McmSerial.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%QRSerial%", qrContent)

        Return zpl
    End Function

    ' Clear serial number fields for next label
    Private Sub ClearSerialFields()
        txt_QRScan.Text = ""
        txt_McmSerial.Text = ""
        txt_RemSerial.Text = ""
        txt_DatePaired.Text = ""
        txt_BagColor.Text = ""
        lbl_Status.Text = ""

        ' Return focus to QR scan field (Part Number stays same for batch)
        txt_QRScan.Select()
        txt_QRScan.Focus()

    Private Sub btn_ClearAll_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btn_ClearAll.Click
        txt_PartNum.Text = ""
        ClearSerialFields()

    End Sub

    Private Sub frm_Labeling_label_Reprint_2_FormClosing(sender As Object, e As FormClosingEventArgs) Handles MyBase.FormClosing
        ' Cleanup if needed
    End Sub

End Class

content.thinking: Perfect! I've created the form with all three files. Now let me create a brief usage guide/documentation for the user.

content.text:
I've created the new form `frm_Labeling_label_Reprint_2` for reprinting labels with QR code scanning. Here's what was created:

## Files Created

1. **frm_Labeling_label_Reprint_2.vb** - Main form code
2. **frm_Labeling_label_Reprint_2.Designer.vb** - UI design
3. **frm_Labeling_label_Reprint_2.resx** - Form resources

## Features

### Workflow
1. **Enter Part Number** - Type the part number and press Enter
2. **Scan QR Code** - Scan the QR code from the existing label
   - Automatically splits QR data: `NCNSerial-RemSerial-DatePaired`
   - Populates MCM Serial, REM Serial, and Date Paired fields
3. **Enter Bag Color** - Type the bag color and press Enter
4. **Print** - Label prints automatically to the default 600dpi printer
5. **Auto-Clear** - Serial fields clear automatically for the next label (Part Number remains)

### UI Elements

- **Part Number** (input) - Stays persistent for batch printing
- **Scan QR Code** (input) - Scans and parses QR code
- **QR Code Data Group** (read-only fields):
  - MCM Serial (NCN Serial)
  - REM Serial
  - Date Paired
- **Bag Color** (input) - Required for each label
- **PRINT LABEL** button - Prints the label (or press Enter after Bag Color)
- **Clear All** button - Resets entire form
- **Status Label** - Shows success/error messages

### Label Format

The form uses the ZPL template you provided:
- **600dpi** resolution
- **Part Number, MCM Serial, REM Serial, Date Paired, Bag Color**
- **Code 128 Barcode** with MCM Serial
- **QR Code** with format: `NCNSerial-RemSerial-DatePaired`

### Key Features

- **Keyboard Navigation** - Press Enter to move between fields
- **Automatic QR Parsing** - Splits QR code on hyphens (-)
- **Validation** - Checks all required fields before printing
- **Batch-Friendly** - Part Number persists; serial fields clear after each print
- **Error Handling** - Clear messages for invalid QR codes or missing data
- **Default Printer** - Sends to DEFAULT printer (uses `BeZebraPrint.SendStringToPrinter`)

## Next Steps

1. **Add to Project** - Include these three files in your Visual Studio project (`.vbproj`)
2. **Build** - Compile the project
3. **Open Form** - Call from your menu or existing form:
   ```vb
   Dim frm As New frm_Labeling_label_Reprint_2()
   frm.Show()
   ```
4. **Test** - Test with actual QR codes to verify format

## Notes

- The form assumes QR code format: `NCNSerial-RemSerial-DatePaired` (separated by hyphens)
- If your QR format is different, adjust the `ProcessQRCode()` method (line 44-67 in .vb file)
- Printer selection uses "DEFAULT" - modify line 124 to specify a specific printer name if needed
- All validations are in place to prevent printing with missing data

Imports System.Text.RegularExpressions

Public Class frm_Labeling_label_Reprint_2

    ' Form load event
    Private Sub frm_Labeling_label_Reprint_2_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load
        ' Set focus to Part Number field
        txt_PartNum.Select()
        txt_PartNum.Focus()
    End Sub

    ' Part Number KeyPress - move to QR scan field on Enter
    Private Sub txt_PartNum_KeyPress(sender As Object, e As KeyPressEventArgs) Handles txt_PartNum.KeyPress
        If e.KeyChar = Convert.ToChar(13) Then
            e.Handled = True
            txt_QRScan.Select()
            txt_QRScan.Focus()
        End If
    End Sub

    ' QR Scan KeyPress - process on Enter
    Private Sub txt_QRScan_KeyPress(sender As Object, e As KeyPressEventArgs) Handles txt_QRScan.KeyPress
        If e.KeyChar = Convert.ToChar(13) Then
            e.Handled = True
            ProcessQRCode()
        End If
    End Sub

    ' Bag Color KeyPress - print on Enter
    Private Sub txt_BagColor_KeyPress(sender As Object, e As KeyPressEventArgs) Handles txt_BagColor.KeyPress
        If e.KeyChar = Convert.ToChar(13) Then
            e.Handled = True
            btn_Print.PerformClick()
        End If
    End Sub

    ' Process QR Code - split into components
    Private Sub ProcessQRCode()
        Try
            Dim qrData As String = txt_QRScan.Text.Trim()

            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(qrData) Then
                MessageBox.Show("Please scan a QR code.", "QR Code Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_QRScan.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            ' Split QR code by hyphen: NCNSerial-RemSerial-DatePaired
            Dim parts() As String = qrData.Split("-"c)

            If parts.Length <> 3 Then
                MessageBox.Show("Invalid QR code format. Expected format: NCNSerial-RemSerial-DatePaired", "Invalid QR Code", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
                txt_QRScan.SelectAll()
                txt_QRScan.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            ' Populate fields from QR code
            txt_McmSerial.Text = parts(0).Trim()  ' NCN Serial (MCM Serial)
            txt_RemSerial.Text = parts(1).Trim()  ' REM Serial
            txt_DatePaired.Text = parts(2).Trim() ' Date Paired

            ' Move focus to Bag Color
            txt_BagColor.Select()
            txt_BagColor.Focus()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("Error processing QR code: " & ex.Message, "Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            txt_QRScan.SelectAll()
            txt_QRScan.Focus()
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' Print button click
    Private Sub btn_Print_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btn_Print.Click
        Try
            ' Validate all required fields
            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt_PartNum.Text.Trim()) Then
                MessageBox.Show("Please enter Part Number.", "Part Number Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_PartNum.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt_McmSerial.Text.Trim()) Then
                MessageBox.Show("Please scan a QR code first.", "QR Code Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_QRScan.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt_RemSerial.Text.Trim()) Then
                MessageBox.Show("REM Serial is missing. Please scan a valid QR code.", "REM Serial Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_QRScan.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt_DatePaired.Text.Trim()) Then
                MessageBox.Show("Date Paired is missing. Please scan a valid QR code.", "Date Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_QRScan.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt_BagColor.Text.Trim()) Then
                MessageBox.Show("Please enter Bag Color.", "Bag Color Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_BagColor.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            ' Build ZPL code with replacements
            Dim zplCode As String = BuildZPLCode()

            ' Send to printer
            BeZebraPrint.SendStringToPrinter("DEFAULT", zplCode)

            ' Show success message
            lbl_Status.Text = "Label printed successfully!"
            lbl_Status.ForeColor = Color.Green

            ' Clear fields for next label
            ClearSerialFields()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("Error printing label: " & ex.Message, "Print Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            lbl_Status.Text = "Print failed!"
            lbl_Status.ForeColor = Color.Red
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' Build ZPL code with data replacements
    Private Function BuildZPLCode() As String
        ' Reconstruct QR code content: NCNSerial-RemSerial-DatePaired
        Dim qrContent As String = txt_McmSerial.Text.Trim() & "-" & txt_RemSerial.Text.Trim() & "-" & txt_DatePaired.Text.Trim()

        ' ZPL template with placeholders
        Dim zpl As String = "^XA~TA000~JSN^LT0^MNW^MTT^PON^PMN^LH0,0^JMA^PR2,2~SD25^JUS^LRN^CI0^XZ" & vbCrLf &
                           "^XA" & vbCrLf &
                           "^MMT" & vbCrLf &
                           "^PW1200" & vbCrLf &
                           "^LL0600" & vbCrLf &
                           "^LS0" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT55,102^A0N,83,76^FH\^FDPart #:^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT288,102^A0N,83,76^FH\^FD%PartNum%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT55,262^A0N,58,55^FH\^FDREM SERIAL #:^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT443,262^A0N,58,55^FH\^FD%RemSerial%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT455,175^A0N,58,55^FH\^FD%McmSerial%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT55,176^A0N,58,55^FH\^FDMCM SERIAL #:^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT55,434^A0N,58,55^FH\^FDBAG COLOR:^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT55,349^A0N,58,55^FH\^FDDATE PAIRED:^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT426,349^A0N,58,55^FH\^FD%DatePaired%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT375,435^A0N,58,55^FH\^FD%BagColor%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^BY3,3,94^FT55,552^BCN,,N,N" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FD>%BarcodeMcmSerial%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT806,579^BQN,2,9" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FH\^FDMA,%QRSerial%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^PQ1,0,1,Y^XZ"

        ' Replace placeholders with actual data
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%PartNum%", txt_PartNum.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%RemSerial%", txt_RemSerial.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%McmSerial%", txt_McmSerial.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%DatePaired%", txt_DatePaired.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%BagColor%", txt_BagColor.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%BarcodeMcmSerial%", txt_McmSerial.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%QRSerial%", qrContent)

        Return zpl
    End Function

    ' Clear serial number fields for next label
    Private Sub ClearSerialFields()
        txt_QRScan.Text = ""
        txt_McmSerial.Text = ""
        txt_RemSerial.Text = ""
        txt_DatePaired.Text = ""
        txt_BagColor.Text = ""
        lbl_Status.Text = ""

        ' Return focus to QR scan field (Part Number stays same for batch)
        txt_QRScan.Select()
        txt_QRScan.Focus()
    End Sub

    ' Clear All button - reset entire form
    Private Sub btn_ClearAll_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btn_ClearAll.Click
        txt_PartNum.Text = ""
        ClearSerialFields()
        lbl_Status.Text = ""
        txt_PartNum.Select()
        txt_PartNum.Focus()
    End Sub

    ' Form closing event
    Private Sub frm_Labeling_label_Reprint_2_FormClosing(sender As Object, e As FormClosingEventArgs) Handles MyBase.FormClosing
        ' Cleanup if needed
    End Sub

End Class

        Dim qrContent As String = txt_McmSerial.Text.Trim() & "-" & txt_RemSerial.Text.Trim() & "-" & txt_DatePaired.Text.Trim()

        ' ZPL template with placeholders
        Dim zpl As String = "^XA~TA000~JSN^LT0^MNW^MTT^PON^PMN^LH0,0^JMA^PR2,2~SD25^JUS^LRN^CI0^XZ" & vbCrLf &
                           "^XA" & vbCrLf &
                           "^MMT" & vbCrLf &
                           "^PW1200" & vbCrLf &
                           "^LL0600" & vbCrLf &
                           "^LS0" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT55,102^A0N,83,76^FH\^FDPart #:^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT288,102^A0N,83,76^FH\^FD%PartNum%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT55,262^A0N,58,55^FH\^FDREM SERIAL #:^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT443,262^A0N,58,55^FH\^FD%RemSerial%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT455,175^A0N,58,55^FH\^FD%McmSerial%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT55,176^A0N,58,55^FH\^FDMCM SERIAL #:^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT55,434^A0N,58,55^FH\^FDBAG COLOR:^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT55,349^A0N,58,55^FH\^FDDATE PAIRED:^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT426,349^A0N,58,55^FH\^FD%DatePaired%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT375,435^A0N,58,55^FH\^FD%BagColor%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^BY3,3,94^FT55,552^BCN,,N,N" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FD>%BarcodeMcmSerial%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT806,579^BQN,2,9" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FH\^FDMA,%QRSerial%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^PQ1,0,1,Y^XZ"

        ' Replace placeholders with actual data
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%PartNum%", txt_PartNum.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%RemSerial%", txt_RemSerial.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%McmSerial%", txt_McmSerial.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%DatePaired%", txt_DatePaired.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%BagColor%", txt_BagColor.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%BarcodeMcmSerial%", txt_McmSerial.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%QRSerial%", qrContent)

        Return zpl
    End Function

    ' Clear serial number fields for next label
    Private Sub ClearSerialFields()
        txt_QRScan.Text = ""
        txt_McmSerial.Text = ""
        txt_RemSerial.Text = ""
        txt_DatePaired.Text = ""
        txt_BagColor.Text = ""
        lbl_Status.Text = ""

        ' Return focus to QR scan field (Part Number stays same for batch)
        txt_QRScan.Select()
        txt_QRScan.Focus()
    End Sub

    ' Clear All button - reset entire form
    Private Sub btn_ClearAll_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btn_ClearAll.Click
        txt_PartNum.Text = ""
        ClearSerialFields()
        lbl_Status.Text = ""
        txt_PartNum.Select()
        txt_PartNum.Focus()
    End Sub

    ' Form closing event
    Private Sub frm_Labeling_label_Reprint_2_FormClosing(sender As Object, e As FormClosingEventArgs) Handles MyBase.FormClosing
        ' Cleanup if needed
    End Sub

End Class

## Changes Made

- Removed the corrupted icon entry that was causing the error
- The form will now use the default Windows form icon

## What This Means

The form will now:
- ✅ Load in the Visual Studio designer without errors
- ✅ Display with the default Windows form icon (instead of a custom icon)
- ✅ Function normally at runtime

## If You Want to Add an Icon Later

You can add an icon through the Visual Studio designer:
1. Open the form in the designer
2. Select the form (click on the form's title bar)
3. In Properties window, find the "Icon" property
4. Click the "..." button to browse for a valid `.ico` file

content.thinking:
The user wants to change the Part Number and Bag Color inputs from textboxes to dropdowns that are linked together. When a part number is selected, the corresponding color should automatically be selected.

Imports System.Text.RegularExpressions

Public Class frm_Labels_labelReprint2

    ' Form load event
    Private Sub frm_Labels_labelReprint2_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load
        ' Set focus to Part Number field
        txt_PartNum.Select()
        txt_PartNum.Focus()
    End Sub

    ' Part Number KeyPress - move to QR scan field on Enter
    Private Sub txt_PartNum_KeyPress(sender As Object, e As KeyPressEventArgs) Handles txt_PartNum.KeyPress
        If e.KeyChar = Convert.ToChar(13) Then
            e.Handled = True
            txt_QRScan.Select()
            txt_QRScan.Focus()
        End If
    End Sub

    ' QR Scan KeyPress - process on Enter
    Private Sub txt_QRScan_KeyPress(sender As Object, e As KeyPressEventArgs) Handles txt_QRScan.KeyPress
        If e.KeyChar = Convert.ToChar(13) Then
            e.Handled = True
            ProcessQRCode()
        End If
    End Sub

    ' Bag Color KeyPress - print on Enter
    Private Sub txt_BagColor_KeyPress(sender As Object, e As KeyPressEventArgs) Handles txt_BagColor.KeyPress
        If e.KeyChar = Convert.ToChar(13) Then
            e.Handled = True
            btn_Print.PerformClick()
        End If
    End Sub

    ' Process QR Code - split into components
    Private Sub ProcessQRCode()
        Try
            Dim qrData As String = txt_QRScan.Text.Trim()

            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(qrData) Then
                MessageBox.Show("Please scan a QR code.", "QR Code Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_QRScan.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            ' Split QR code by hyphen: NCNSerial-RemSerial-DatePaired
            Dim parts() As String = qrData.Split("-"c)

            If parts.Length <> 3 Then
                MessageBox.Show("Invalid QR code format. Expected format: NCNSerial-RemSerial-DatePaired", "Invalid QR Code", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
                txt_QRScan.SelectAll()
                txt_QRScan.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            ' Populate fields from QR code
            txt_McmSerial.Text = parts(0).Trim()  ' NCN Serial (MCM Serial)
            txt_RemSerial.Text = parts(1).Trim()  ' REM Serial
            txt_DatePaired.Text = parts(2).Trim() ' Date Paired

            ' Move focus to Bag Color
            txt_BagColor.Select()
            txt_BagColor.Focus()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("Error processing QR code: " & ex.Message, "Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            txt_QRScan.SelectAll()
            txt_QRScan.Focus()
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' Print button click
    Private Sub btn_Print_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btn_Print.Click
        Try
            ' Validate all required fields
            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt_PartNum.Text.Trim()) Then
                MessageBox.Show("Please enter Part Number.", "Part Number Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_PartNum.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt_McmSerial.Text.Trim()) Then
                MessageBox.Show("Please scan a QR code first.", "QR Code Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_QRScan.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt_RemSerial.Text.Trim()) Then
                MessageBox.Show("REM Serial is missing. Please scan a valid QR code.", "REM Serial Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_QRScan.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt_DatePaired.Text.Trim()) Then
                MessageBox.Show("Date Paired is missing. Please scan a valid QR code.", "Date Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_QRScan.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt_BagColor.Text.Trim()) Then
                MessageBox.Show("Please enter Bag Color.", "Bag Color Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_BagColor.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            ' Build ZPL code with replacements
            Dim zplCode As String = BuildZPLCode()

            ' Send to printer
            BeZebraPrint.SendStringToPrinter("DEFAULT", zplCode)

            ' Show success message
            lbl_Status.Text = "Label printed successfully!"
            lbl_Status.ForeColor = Color.Green

            ' Clear fields for next label
            ClearSerialFields()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("Error printing label: " & ex.Message, "Print Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            lbl_Status.Text = "Print failed!"
            lbl_Status.ForeColor = Color.Red
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' Build ZPL code with data replacements
    Private Function BuildZPLCode() As String
        ' Reconstruct QR code content: NCNSerial-RemSerial-DatePaired
        Dim qrContent As String = txt_McmSerial.Text.Trim() & "-" & txt_RemSerial.Text.Trim() & "-" & txt_DatePaired.Text.Trim()

        ' ZPL template with placeholders
        Dim zpl As String = "^XA~TA000~JSN^LT0^MNW^MTT^PON^PMN^LH0,0^JMA^PR2,2~SD25^JUS^LRN^CI0^XZ" & vbCrLf &
                           "^XA" & vbCrLf &
                           "^MMT" & vbCrLf &
                           "^PW1200" & vbCrLf &
                           "^LL0600" & vbCrLf &
                           "^LS0" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT55,102^A0N,83,76^FH\^FDPart #:^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT288,102^A0N,83,76^FH\^FD%PartNum%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT55,262^A0N,58,55^FH\^FDREM SERIAL #:^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT443,262^A0N,58,55^FH\^FD%RemSerial%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT455,175^A0N,58,55^FH\^FD%McmSerial%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT55,176^A0N,58,55^FH\^FDMCM SERIAL #:^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT55,434^A0N,58,55^FH\^FDBAG COLOR:^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT55,349^A0N,58,55^FH\^FDDATE PAIRED:^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT426,349^A0N,58,55^FH\^FD%DatePaired%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT375,435^A0N,58,55^FH\^FD%BagColor%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^BY3,3,94^FT55,552^BCN,,N,N" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FD>%BarcodeMcmSerial%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT806,579^BQN,2,9" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FH\^FDMA,%QRSerial%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^PQ1,0,1,Y^XZ"

        ' Replace placeholders with actual data
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%PartNum%", txt_PartNum.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%RemSerial%", txt_RemSerial.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%McmSerial%", txt_McmSerial.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%DatePaired%", txt_DatePaired.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%BagColor%", txt_BagColor.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%BarcodeMcmSerial%", txt_McmSerial.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%QRSerial%", qrContent)

        Return zpl
    End Function

    ' Clear serial number fields for next label
    Private Sub ClearSerialFields()
        txt_QRScan.Text = ""
        txt_McmSerial.Text = ""
        txt_RemSerial.Text = ""
        txt_DatePaired.Text = ""
        lbl_Status.Text = ""

        ' Return focus to QR scan field (Part Number stays same for batch)
        txt_QRScan.Select()
        txt_QRScan.Focus()
    End Sub

    ' Clear All button - reset entire form
    Private Sub btn_ClearAll_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btn_ClearAll.Click
        txt_PartNum.Text = ""
        ClearSerialFields()
        lbl_Status.Text = ""
        txt_PartNum.Select()
        txt_PartNum.Focus()
    End Sub

    ' Form closing event
    Private Sub frm_Labels_labelReprint2_FormClosing(sender As Object, e As FormClosingEventArgs) Handles MyBase.FormClosing
        ' Cleanup if needed
    End Sub

End Class

input.new_string:
Imports System.Text.RegularExpressions

Public Class frm_Labels_labelReprint2

    ' Part Number to Color mapping
    Private partColorMap As New Dictionary(Of String, String) From {
        {"11.041666.0001", "Red"},
        {"11.041666.0002", "Yellow"},
        {"11.041666.0003", "White"},
        {"11.041666.0004", "Blue"}
    }

    ' Form load event
    Private Sub frm_Labels_labelReprint2_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load
        ' Initialize Part Number dropdown
        cbo_PartNum.Items.Clear()
        For Each partNum In partColorMap.Keys
            cbo_PartNum.Items.Add(partNum)
        Next
        cbo_PartNum.DropDownStyle = ComboBoxStyle.DropDownList

        ' Initialize Bag Color dropdown
        cbo_BagColor.Items.Clear()
        For Each color In partColorMap.Values.Distinct()
            cbo_BagColor.Items.Add(color)
        Next
        cbo_BagColor.DropDownStyle = ComboBoxStyle.DropDownList

        ' Set focus to Part Number field
        cbo_PartNum.Select()
        cbo_PartNum.Focus()
    End Sub

    ' Part Number selection changed - auto-populate color
    Private Sub cbo_PartNum_SelectedIndexChanged(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles cbo_PartNum.SelectedIndexChanged
        If cbo_PartNum.SelectedItem IsNot Nothing Then
            Dim selectedPart As String = cbo_PartNum.SelectedItem.ToString()
            If partColorMap.ContainsKey(selectedPart) Then
                cbo_BagColor.SelectedItem = partColorMap(selectedPart)
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

    ' Part Number KeyPress - move to QR scan field on Enter
    Private Sub cbo_PartNum_KeyPress(sender As Object, e As KeyPressEventArgs) Handles cbo_PartNum.KeyPress
        If e.KeyChar = Convert.ToChar(13) Then
            e.Handled = True
            txt_QRScan.Select()
            txt_QRScan.Focus()
        End If
    End Sub

        If e.KeyChar = Convert.ToChar(13) Then
            e.Handled = True
            txt_QRScan.Select()
            txt_QRScan.Focus()
        End If
    End Sub

    ' QR Scan KeyPress - process on Enter
    Private Sub txt_QRScan_KeyPress(sender As Object, e As KeyPressEventArgs) Handles txt_QRScan.KeyPress
        If e.KeyChar = Convert.ToChar(13) Then
            e.Handled = True
            ProcessQRCode()
        End If
    End Sub

    ' Bag Color KeyPress - print on Enter
    Private Sub txt_BagColor_KeyPress(sender As Object, e As KeyPressEventArgs) Handles txt_BagColor.KeyPress
        If e.KeyChar = Convert.ToChar(13) Then
            e.Handled = True
            btn_Print.PerformClick()
        End If
    End Sub

    ' Process QR Code - split into components
    Private Sub ProcessQRCode()
        Try
            Dim qrData As String = txt_QRScan.Text.Trim()

            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(qrData) Then
                MessageBox.Show("Please scan a QR code.", "QR Code Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_QRScan.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            ' Split QR code by hyphen: NCNSerial-RemSerial-DatePaired
            Dim parts() As String = qrData.Split("-"c)

            If parts.Length <> 3 Then
                MessageBox.Show("Invalid QR code format. Expected format: NCNSerial-RemSerial-DatePaired", "Invalid QR Code", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
                txt_QRScan.SelectAll()
                txt_QRScan.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            ' Populate fields from QR code
            txt_McmSerial.Text = parts(0).Trim()  ' NCN Serial (MCM Serial)
            txt_RemSerial.Text = parts(1).Trim()  ' REM Serial
            txt_DatePaired.Text = parts(2).Trim() ' Date Paired

            ' Move focus to Bag Color
            txt_BagColor.Select()
            txt_BagColor.Focus()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("Error processing QR code: " & ex.Message, "Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            txt_QRScan.SelectAll()
            txt_QRScan.Focus()
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' Print button click
    Private Sub btn_Print_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btn_Print.Click
        Try
            ' Validate all required fields
            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt_PartNum.Text.Trim()) Then
                MessageBox.Show("Please enter Part Number.", "Part Number Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_PartNum.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt_McmSerial.Text.Trim()) Then
                MessageBox.Show("Please scan a QR code first.", "QR Code Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_QRScan.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt_RemSerial.Text.Trim()) Then
                MessageBox.Show("REM Serial is missing. Please scan a valid QR code.", "REM Serial Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_QRScan.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt_DatePaired.Text.Trim()) Then
                MessageBox.Show("Date Paired is missing. Please scan a valid QR code.", "Date Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_QRScan.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt_BagColor.Text.Trim()) Then
                MessageBox.Show("Please enter Bag Color.", "Bag Color Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_BagColor.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            ' Build ZPL code with replacements
            Dim zplCode As String = BuildZPLCode()

            ' Send to printer
            BeZebraPrint.SendStringToPrinter("DEFAULT", zplCode)

            ' Show success message
            lbl_Status.Text = "Label printed successfully!"
            lbl_Status.ForeColor = Color.Green

            ' Clear fields for next label
            ClearSerialFields()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("Error printing label: " & ex.Message, "Print Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            lbl_Status.Text = "Print failed!"
            lbl_Status.ForeColor = Color.Red
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' Build ZPL code with data replacements
    Private Function BuildZPLCode() As String
        ' Reconstruct QR code content: NCNSerial-RemSerial-DatePaired
        Dim qrContent As String = txt_McmSerial.Text.Trim() & "-" & txt_RemSerial.Text.Trim() & "-" & txt_DatePaired.Text.Trim()

        ' ZPL template with placeholders
        Dim zpl As String = "^XA~TA000~JSN^LT0^MNW^MTT^PON^PMN^LH0,0^JMA^PR2,2~SD25^JUS^LRN^CI0^XZ" & vbCrLf &
                           "^XA" & vbCrLf &
                           "^MMT" & vbCrLf &
                           "^PW1200" & vbCrLf &
                           "^LL0600" & vbCrLf &
                           "^LS0" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT55,102^A0N,83,76^FH\^FDPart #:^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT288,102^A0N,83,76^FH\^FD%PartNum%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT55,262^A0N,58,55^FH\^FDREM SERIAL #:^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT443,262^A0N,58,55^FH\^FD%RemSerial%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT455,175^A0N,58,55^FH\^FD%McmSerial%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT55,176^A0N,58,55^FH\^FDMCM SERIAL #:^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT55,434^A0N,58,55^FH\^FDBAG COLOR:^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT55,349^A0N,58,55^FH\^FDDATE PAIRED:^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT426,349^A0N,58,55^FH\^FD%DatePaired%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT375,435^A0N,58,55^FH\^FD%BagColor%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^BY3,3,94^FT55,552^BCN,,N,N" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FD>%BarcodeMcmSerial%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT806,579^BQN,2,9" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FH\^FDMA,%QRSerial%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^PQ1,0,1,Y^XZ"

        ' Replace placeholders with actual data
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%PartNum%", txt_PartNum.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%RemSerial%", txt_RemSerial.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%McmSerial%", txt_McmSerial.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%DatePaired%", txt_DatePaired.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%BagColor%", txt_BagColor.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%BarcodeMcmSerial%", txt_McmSerial.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%QRSerial%", qrContent)

        Return zpl
    End Function

    ' Clear serial number fields for next label
    Private Sub ClearSerialFields()
        txt_QRScan.Text = ""
        txt_McmSerial.Text = ""
        txt_RemSerial.Text = ""
        txt_DatePaired.Text = ""
        lbl_Status.Text = ""

        ' Return focus to QR scan field (Part Number stays same for batch)
        txt_QRScan.Select()
        txt_QRScan.Focus()
    End Sub

    ' Clear All button - reset entire form
    Private Sub btn_ClearAll_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btn_ClearAll.Click
        txt_PartNum.Text = ""
        ClearSerialFields()
        lbl_Status.Text = ""
        txt_PartNum.Select()
        txt_PartNum.Focus()
    End Sub

    ' Form closing event
    Private Sub frm_Labels_labelReprint2_FormClosing(sender As Object, e As FormClosingEventArgs) Handles MyBase.FormClosing
        ' Cleanup if needed
    End Sub

End Class

Imports System.Text.RegularExpressions

Public Class frm_Labels_labelReprint2

    ' Part Number to Color mapping
    Private partColorMap As New Dictionary(Of String, String) From {
        {"11.041666.0001", "Red"},
        {"11.041666.0002", "Yellow"},
        {"11.041666.0003", "White"},
        {"11.041666.0004", "Blue"}
    }

    ' Form load event
    Private Sub frm_Labels_labelReprint2_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load
        ' Initialize Part Number dropdown
        cbo_PartNum.Items.Clear()
        For Each partNum In partColorMap.Keys
            cbo_PartNum.Items.Add(partNum)
        Next
        cbo_PartNum.DropDownStyle = ComboBoxStyle.DropDownList

        ' Initialize Bag Color dropdown
        cbo_BagColor.Items.Clear()
        For Each color In partColorMap.Values.Distinct()
            cbo_BagColor.Items.Add(color)
        Next
        cbo_BagColor.DropDownStyle = ComboBoxStyle.DropDownList

        ' Set focus to Part Number field
        cbo_PartNum.Select()
        cbo_PartNum.Focus()
    End Sub

    ' Part Number selection changed - auto-populate color
    Private Sub cbo_PartNum_SelectedIndexChanged(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles cbo_PartNum.SelectedIndexChanged
        If cbo_PartNum.SelectedItem IsNot Nothing Then
            Dim selectedPart As String = cbo_PartNum.SelectedItem.ToString()
            If partColorMap.ContainsKey(selectedPart) Then
                cbo_BagColor.SelectedItem = partColorMap(selectedPart)
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

    ' Part Number KeyPress - move to QR scan field on Enter
    Private Sub cbo_PartNum_KeyPress(sender As Object, e As KeyPressEventArgs) Handles cbo_PartNum.KeyPress
        If e.KeyChar = Convert.ToChar(13) Then
            e.Handled = True
            txt_QRScan.Select()
            txt_QRScan.Focus()
        End If
    End Sub

    ' QR Scan KeyPress - process on Enter
    Private Sub txt_QRScan_KeyPress(sender As Object, e As KeyPressEventArgs) Handles txt_QRScan.KeyPress
        If e.KeyChar = Convert.ToChar(13) Then
            e.Handled = True
            ProcessQRCode()
        End If
    End Sub

    ' Bag Color KeyPress - print on Enter
    Private Sub txt_BagColor_KeyPress(sender As Object, e As KeyPressEventArgs) Handles txt_BagColor.KeyPress
        If e.KeyChar = Convert.ToChar(13) Then
            e.Handled = True
            btn_Print.PerformClick()
        End If
    End Sub

    ' Process QR Code - split into components
    Private Sub ProcessQRCode()
        Try
            Dim qrData As String = txt_QRScan.Text.Trim()

            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(qrData) Then
                MessageBox.Show("Please scan a QR code.", "QR Code Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_QRScan.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            ' Split QR code by hyphen: NCNSerial-RemSerial-DatePaired
            Dim parts() As String = qrData.Split("-"c)

            If parts.Length <> 3 Then
                MessageBox.Show("Invalid QR code format. Expected format: NCNSerial-RemSerial-DatePaired", "Invalid QR Code", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
                txt_QRScan.SelectAll()
                txt_QRScan.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            ' Populate fields from QR code
            txt_McmSerial.Text = parts(0).Trim()  ' NCN Serial (MCM Serial)
            txt_RemSerial.Text = parts(1).Trim()  ' REM Serial
            txt_DatePaired.Text = parts(2).Trim() ' Date Paired

            ' Move focus to Bag Color
            txt_BagColor.Select()
            txt_BagColor.Focus()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("Error processing QR code: " & ex.Message, "Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            txt_QRScan.SelectAll()
            txt_QRScan.Focus()
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' Print button click
    Private Sub btn_Print_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btn_Print.Click
        Try
            ' Validate all required fields
            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt_PartNum.Text.Trim()) Then
                MessageBox.Show("Please enter Part Number.", "Part Number Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_PartNum.Focus()
                Return

                Return

            ' Build ZPL code with replacements

            ' Show success message

            MessageBox.Show("Error printing label: " & ex.Message, "Print Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)

                           "^FT55,176^A0N,58,55^FH\^FDMCM SERIAL #:^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT55,434^A0N,58,55^FH\^FDBAG COLOR:^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT55,349^A0N,58,55^FH\^FDDATE PAIRED:^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT426,349^A0N,58,55^FH\^FD%DatePaired%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT375,435^A0N,58,55^FH\^FD%BagColor%^FS" & vbCrLf &

                           "^FD>%BarcodeMcmSerial%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT806,579^BQN,2,9" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FH\^FDMA,%QRSerial%^FS" & vbCrLf &

        ' Replace placeholders with actual data
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%PartNum%", txt_PartNum.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%RemSerial%", txt_RemSerial.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%McmSerial%", txt_McmSerial.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%DatePaired%", txt_DatePaired.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%BagColor%", txt_BagColor.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%BarcodeMcmSerial%", txt_McmSerial.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%QRSerial%", qrContent)

        Return zpl
    End Function

    ' Clear serial number fields for next label
    Private Sub ClearSerialFields()
        txt_QRScan.Text = ""
        txt_McmSerial.Text = ""
        txt_RemSerial.Text = ""
        txt_DatePaired.Text = ""
        lbl_Status.Text = ""

        ' Return focus to QR scan field (Part Number stays same for batch)
        txt_QRScan.Select()
        txt_QRScan.Focus()

    Private Sub btn_ClearAll_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btn_ClearAll.Click
        txt_PartNum.Text = ""
        ClearSerialFields()
        lbl_Status.Text = ""

    Private Sub frm_Labels_labelReprint2_FormClosing(sender As Object, e As FormClosingEventArgs) Handles MyBase.FormClosing
        ' Cleanup if needed
    End Sub

                txt_QRScan.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            ' Populate fields from QR code
            txt_McmSerial.Text = parts(0).Trim()  ' NCN Serial (MCM Serial)
            txt_RemSerial.Text = parts(1).Trim()  ' REM Serial
            txt_DatePaired.Text = parts(2).Trim() ' Date Paired

            ' Move focus to Bag Color
            txt_BagColor.Select()
            txt_BagColor.Focus()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("Error processing QR code: " & ex.Message, "Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            txt_QRScan.SelectAll()
            txt_QRScan.Focus()
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' Print button click
    Private Sub btn_Print_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btn_Print.Click
        Try
            ' Validate all required fields
            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt_PartNum.Text.Trim()) Then
                MessageBox.Show("Please enter Part Number.", "Part Number Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_PartNum.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt_McmSerial.Text.Trim()) Then
                MessageBox.Show("Please scan a QR code first.", "QR Code Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_QRScan.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt_RemSerial.Text.Trim()) Then
                MessageBox.Show("REM Serial is missing. Please scan a valid QR code.", "REM Serial Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_QRScan.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt_DatePaired.Text.Trim()) Then
                MessageBox.Show("Date Paired is missing. Please scan a valid QR code.", "Date Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_QRScan.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt_BagColor.Text.Trim()) Then
                MessageBox.Show("Please enter Bag Color.", "Bag Color Required", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                txt_BagColor.Focus()
                Return
            End If

            ' Build ZPL code with replacements
            Dim zplCode As String = BuildZPLCode()

            ' Send to printer
            BeZebraPrint.SendStringToPrinter("DEFAULT", zplCode)

            ' Show success message
            lbl_Status.Text = "Label printed successfully!"
            lbl_Status.ForeColor = Color.Green

            ' Clear fields for next label
            ClearSerialFields()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("Error printing label: " & ex.Message, "Print Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            lbl_Status.Text = "Print failed!"
            lbl_Status.ForeColor = Color.Red
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' Build ZPL code with data replacements
    Private Function BuildZPLCode() As String
        ' Reconstruct QR code content: NCNSerial-RemSerial-DatePaired
        Dim qrContent As String = txt_McmSerial.Text.Trim() & "-" & txt_RemSerial.Text.Trim() & "-" & txt_DatePaired.Text.Trim()

        ' ZPL template with placeholders
        Dim zpl As String = "^XA~TA000~JSN^LT0^MNW^MTT^PON^PMN^LH0,0^JMA^PR2,2~SD25^JUS^LRN^CI0^XZ" & vbCrLf &
                           "^XA" & vbCrLf &
                           "^MMT" & vbCrLf &
                           "^PW1200" & vbCrLf &
                           "^LL0600" & vbCrLf &
                           "^LS0" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT55,102^A0N,83,76^FH\^FDPart #:^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT288,102^A0N,83,76^FH\^FD%PartNum%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT55,262^A0N,58,55^FH\^FDREM SERIAL #:^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT443,262^A0N,58,55^FH\^FD%RemSerial%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT455,175^A0N,58,55^FH\^FD%McmSerial%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT55,176^A0N,58,55^FH\^FDMCM SERIAL #:^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT55,434^A0N,58,55^FH\^FDBAG COLOR:^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT55,349^A0N,58,55^FH\^FDDATE PAIRED:^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT426,349^A0N,58,55^FH\^FD%DatePaired%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT375,435^A0N,58,55^FH\^FD%BagColor%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^BY3,3,94^FT55,552^BCN,,N,N" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FD>%BarcodeMcmSerial%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FT806,579^BQN,2,9" & vbCrLf &
                           "^FH\^FDMA,%QRSerial%^FS" & vbCrLf &
                           "^PQ1,0,1,Y^XZ"

        ' Replace placeholders with actual data
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%PartNum%", txt_PartNum.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%RemSerial%", txt_RemSerial.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%McmSerial%", txt_McmSerial.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%DatePaired%", txt_DatePaired.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%BagColor%", txt_BagColor.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%BarcodeMcmSerial%", txt_McmSerial.Text.Trim())
        zpl = zpl.Replace("%QRSerial%", qrContent)

        Return zpl
    End Function

    ' Clear serial number fields for next label
    Private Sub ClearSerialFields()
        txt_QRScan.Text = ""
        txt_McmSerial.Text = ""
        txt_RemSerial.Text = ""
        txt_DatePaired.Text = ""
        lbl_Status.Text = ""

        ' Return focus to QR scan field (Part Number stays same for batch)
        txt_QRScan.Select()
        txt_QRScan.Focus()
    End Sub

    ' Clear All button - reset entire form
    Private Sub btn_ClearAll_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btn_ClearAll.Click
        txt_PartNum.Text = ""
        ClearSerialFields()
        lbl_Status.Text = ""
        txt_PartNum.Select()
        txt_PartNum.Focus()
    End Sub

    ' Form closing event
    Private Sub frm_Labels_labelReprint2_FormClosing(sender As Object, e As FormClosingEventArgs) Handles MyBase.FormClosing
        ' Cleanup if needed
    End Sub

End Class
